variants.title: Donaldson P502020 Lube Spin-On
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P502020 Lube Spin-On is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Lube Spin-On, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 20µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 80.0 mm, Length: 80.0 mm, Thread: 3/4-16, Δ Collapse Pressure: 6 bar, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 20µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose, Collapse Pressure: 6.9 BAR
